hero.label: Women's Botanical Wellness

product.subtitle: Botanical Beverage Mix Pomegranate
product.description: A delicious pomegranate-flavored wellness drink infused with 12 premium botanicals from France, USA, Spain, and Asia. French patented formula, clinically proven, with science-backed ingredients.

benefits.label: Why Bloomie
benefits.title: Feel the Difference
benefits.skinClarityDesc: Clears hormonal acne for radiant glow

lifestyle.label: Your Daily Ritual
lifestyle.description: Simply mix with water for a delicious pomegranate wellness drink. Best taken daily in the morning for optimal results. Within weeks, you'll feel the difference in your energy, mood, and cycle comfort.

ingredients.label: 12 Premium Botanicals
ingredients.title: Nature's Finest Ingredients
ingredients.description: Sourced from France, USA, Spain, and Asia. Each ingredient is carefully selected for its proven benefits in women's health.

howTo.label: Simple & Delicious
howTo.title: How to Enjoy Bloomie
howTo.step1Desc: Tear open one sachet of Bloomie
howTo.step2Desc: Pour into 150ml of warm or cold water
howTo.step3Desc: Stir well and enjoy your daily wellness drink

testimonials.label: Real Stories
testimonials.title: Loved by Women
testimonials.t1: After 2 months of Bloomie, my cramps have significantly reduced. I used to dread my period but now it's so much more manageable!
testimonials.t2: The pomegranate flavor is delicious! I drink it every morning. My skin has cleared up and my cycle is finally regular after years of irregularity.
testimonials.t3: I bought this for my mood swings and it's been a game-changer. I feel calmer, more energized, and my hormonal acne is almost gone.

cta.description: Join thousands of women who've transformed their wellness with Bloomie. Your body deserves the best.
